goal: Create a 3D interactive world map app where hovering over a country displays the country name, the current leader's name, and their image. Additionally, create a comprehensive Excel spreadsheet containing a table of all current world leaders' names and details.

steps.name: Research world leaders data
steps.description: Use web search to find a reliable, up-to-date list of all current world leaders, their countries, and image URLs.
steps.done_when: A comprehensive dataset of world leaders is retrieved.

steps.name: Generate Excel spreadsheet
steps.description: Create a professional Excel file at C:\Users\AAYUSHI\Desktop\World_Leaders.xlsx containing columns: Country, Leader Name, and Image URL.
steps.done_when: File exists at the specified path with all data populated.

steps.name: Initialize 3D map project structure
steps.description: Create a directory C:\Users\AAYUSHI\Desktop\WorldMapApp and initialize a basic HTML structure using Three.js.

steps.name: Write index.html
steps.description: Write the HTML file with a canvas element for the 3D scene and a UI overlay for the hover tooltip.
steps.done_when: index.html is created in the project folder.

steps.name: Write styles.css
steps.description: Write CSS to style the 3D canvas to fill the screen and define the appearance of the country information tooltip.
steps.done_when: styles.css is created in the project folder.

steps.name: Write main.js
steps.description: Write the Three.js logic to load a 3D globe, implement raycasting for hover detection, and update the tooltip with data from the leaders list.
steps.done_when: main.js is created in the project folder.

steps.name: Verify code quality
steps.description: Run verification on the created files to ensure the Three.js implementation is syntactically correct.

steps.name: Notify user
steps.description: Send a desktop notification confirming the 3D map app and Excel file are ready on the desktop.
